Back to Chat|

QABuddy.AI Architecture

How We Built the Backend

Ingestion Pipeline

10 source folders + JIRA MCP (JQL) → Loader/Parser → Chunker → Embedding → Vector DB upsert + Metadata store. Hourly cron (Phase 1) → webhook/file-watcher (Phase 2).

Retrieval Pipeline

Question → Understand/Rewrite → Parallel Search (Dense + BM25) → Merge → Cross-Encoder Rerank → Context Assembly → LLM Answer with Citations.

Chunking Strategy

Code: by function/class (~300-500 tokens). CSV: 10-row groups. JIRA: per ticket. PDFs: ~500 tokens by heading. Meeting notes: by speaker turn. Jenkins: by build/stage.

JIRA MCP Integration

JQL queries run hourly via Vercel Cron. Tickets are normalized, chunked by field (summary, description, comments), embedded, and upserted with ticket_key metadata for citation.

Overall Architecture

Vercel (Serverless)
Next.js App Router
API Routes (/api/chat, /api/ingest, /api/cron)
Vercel Cron (hourly)
Qdrant Cloud

Vector DB — dense + sparse vectors, payload filtering

LLM API (Groq/Together)

gpt-oss-120b or llama-3.1-70b via OpenAI-compatible API

Neon Postgres

Metadata store — source paths, ticket IDs, line ranges, timestamps

Technologies & Implementation Details

LayerChoiceHostedWhy
Frontend + APINext.js 14 App RouterVercelNative fit, zero-config deploys, serverless functions
EmbeddingBAAI/bge-m3External inferenceDense + sparse + ColBERT in one model, 8k context
Vector DBQdrantQdrant CloudNative sparse vectors, payload filtering, managed
Keyword SearchBM25 via Qdrant sparseQdrant CloudExact-match for ticket IDs, exceptions, method names
RerankerBAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3External inferenceCross-encoder reorders merged candidates
LLMgpt-oss-120b / llama-3.1-70bGroq / TogetherOpenAI-compatible API, fast, high quality
MetadataPostgresNeon / SupabaseFree tier, Vercel-compatible, tracks citations
SchedulingVercel CronVercelFree, simple, triggers /api/cron hourly

Flow Diagrams

Query-Time Flow

1User asks a question
2Understand/Rewrite into search variants
3Parallel Search: Dense + BM25
4Merge results (Reciprocal Rank Fusion)
5Cross-Encoder Rerank → top 6 chunks
6LLM generates cited answer

Ingestion-Time Flow

Vercel Cron triggers hourly
Load 10 source folders + JIRA (JQL)
Parse & chunk by source type
Embed with BGE-M3 (dense + sparse)
Upsert to Qdrant + metadata to Postgres
